mapper.select: /* SQL ID : OrgAbsentRatioDAO.select 설 명 : 결시원 성적비율 정보 조회 */ SELECT ORG_ID AS orgId , ABSNCE_GBNCD AS absentGbn , (SELECT CDNM FROM TB_SYS_CODE WHERE CTGRCD = 'ABSENT_SCORE_GBN_CD' AND CD = ABSNCE_GBNCD) AS absentGbnNm , EXAM_GBNCD AS examGbn , (SELECT CDNM FROM TB_SYS_CODE WHERE CTGRCD = 'ABSENT_SCORE_EXAM_CD' AND CD = EXAM_GBNCD) AS examGbnNm , ABSNCE_RFLTRT AS scorRatio , ABSNCE_EXPLN AS absentDesc , RGTR_ID AS rgtrId , FRST_INQ_DTTM AS regDttm , MDFR_ID AS mdfrId , MOD_DTTM AS modDttm FROM TB_LMS_MRK_ABSNCE_RFLTRT WHERE 1 = 1 AND ORG_ID = #{orgId} AND ABSNCE_GBNCD = #{absentGbn} AND EXAM_GBNCD = #{examGbn}
